application.name: shadowcam2isis
application.brief: Import an ShadowCam image as an Isis cube
application.description: This program takes a raw EDR image from the KPLO ShadowCam (Camera) and produces an Isis cube containing the image data. ShadowCam images in the CDR or RDR format can be used directly, with no processing required.

parameter.name: TO
parameter.description: This is the resultant cube, containing the image and label data.

parameter.name: KEEPSPECIALPIXELS
parameter.brief: Don't replace 0/255 with Special Pixels LIS/HIS
parameter.description: Don't replace 0/255 with LIS/HIS (default is to replace special pixels)
